description.zh-Hans: 注释节点，不参与计算。在图形画布上渲染为便签卡片。提供可选的直通功能以支持图形流程。
description.en: Annotation node with no computation. Renders as a note card on the graph canvas. Provides optional passthrough for graph flow.

triggers.zh-Hans: 注释, 备注, 说明, 便签, 标注
triggers.en: comment, note, annotation, label, sticky note

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 在图表面布上添加注释说明某一区域的用途。
exampleUsage.en: Add a comment note on the graph canvas explaining an area's purpose.
